evals.prompt: Generate a changelog from our recent commits. We use conventional commits.
evals.expected_output: CHANGELOG.md created or updated. Follows Keep a Changelog format. Groups by Added, Fixed, Changed, etc. Includes version and date.

evals.prompt: /changelog v1.0.0 v1.1.0 - we need release notes for the new version
evals.expected_output: Changelog for commits between v1.0.0 and v1.1.0. Conventional commit grouping. Ready for release notes.
